---
title: "coordinator.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/coordinator.py"
loc: 57
complexity: 6
logic_score: 2.82
style_score: 3.62
intel_score: 4.21
overall_score: 4.49
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MissionCoordinator, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)
- [uuid](file://uuid)

### Exports
- `MissionCoordinator`
- `__init__`
- `select_mission`
- `_legacy_sort`
